chapter_title.ar: باب فِي أَنَّ الْإِمَامَ مَتَى يَعْلَمُ أَنَّ الْأَمْرَ قَدْ صَارَ إِلَيْهِ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 90 – Regarding the Imam<sup>asws</sup>, when does he<sup>asws</sup> know that the command has come to him<sup>asws</sup>

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف على المشهور - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (4/238)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف على المشهور - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (4/238)
text: قُلْتُ لِأَبِي الْحَسَنِ ( عليه السلام ) إِنَّهُمْ رَوَوْا عَنْكَ فِي مَوْتِ أَبِي الْحَسَنِ ( عليه السلام ) أَنَّ رَجُلًا قَالَ لَكَ عَلِمْتَ ذَلِكَ بِقَوْلِ سَعِيدٍ فَقَالَ جَاءَ سَعِيدٌ بَعْدَ مَا عَلِمْتُ بِهِ قَبْلَ مَجِيئِهِ

قَالَ وَ سَمِعْتُهُ يَقُولُ طَلَّقْتُ أُمَّ فَرْوَةَ بِنْتَ إِسْحَاقَ فِي رَجَبٍ بَعْدَ مَوْتِ أَبِي الْحَسَنِ بِيَوْمٍ قُلْتُ طَلَّقْتَهَا وَ قَدْ عَلِمْتَ بِمَوْتِ أَبِي الْحَسَنِ قَالَ نَعَمْ قُلْتُ قَبْلَ أَنْ يَقْدَمَ عَلَيْكَ سَعِيدٌ قَالَ نَعَمْ .

en.hubeali: Al Husayn Bin Muhammad, from Moalla Bin Muhammad, from Al Washha who said,

‘I said to Abu Al-Hassan<sup>asws</sup>, ‘They (people) are reporting from you<sup>asws</sup> regarding the passing away of Abu Al-Hassan<sup>asws</sup> (7<sup>th</sup> Imam<sup>asws</sup>), that a man said to you, ‘You knew of that (passing away of the 7<sup>th</sup> Imam<sup>asws</sup> in prison) by the words of Saeed’. So he<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘Saeed came after I<sup>asws</sup> had known of it, before his coming’.

He (the narrator) said, ‘And I heard him<sup>asws</sup> saying: ‘I<sup>asws</sup> divorced Umm Farwa, daughter of Is’haq, after the passing away of Abu Al-Hassan<sup>asws</sup> (7<sup>th</sup> Imam<sup>asws</sup>), by one day’. I said, ‘You<sup>asws</sup> divorced her and you<sup>asws</sup> had known of the passing away of Abu Al-Hassan<sup>asws</sup> (7<sup>th</sup> Imam<sup>asws</sup>)?’ He<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘Yes’. I said, ‘Before the proceeding of Saeed to you<sup>asws</sup>?’ He<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘Yes’.
en.sarwar: 3. al-Husayn ibn Muhammad has narrated from Mu‘alla ibn Muhammad from al-Washsha’ who has said the following. “I said to abu al-Hassan (a.s.), ‘They have narrated from you about the death of abu al-Hassan (Musa al-Kazim (a.s.) that a man said to you, “You have learned that (the death of your father) through the report of Sa‘id.” He said, “Sa‘id came after I learned about that (death of my father) before his coming.” The narrator has said that he asked the Imam (a.s.), “I heard from him that you divorced mother of Farwa, daughter of Ishaq, in the month of Rajab one day after the death of abu al-Hassan (a.s.). Did you divorce her when you knew that abu al-Hassan (a.s.) has died?” The Imam (a.s.) said, “Yes, I did so.” I asked him, “Did you do so before Sa‘id came to you?” The Imam (a.s.) said, “Yes, I did so before Sa‘id came.”
